title: Custom eggless cakes for Box Hill and Rouse Hill families near Riverstone
summary:
Ordered a birthday cake in Rouse Hill and still asked the bakery to double check for eggs? Ask twice if you want. The answer doesn't change.

Every cake at Riverstone is 100% eggless - not an option, the recipe. Box Hill, Rouse Hill and Marsden Park families order the same cake a Jain or vegetarian household would, because there's no separate menu to navigate.

15 flavours including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher. Six sizes, buttercream, fondant or ganache. 48 hours minimum notice - that's what fresh baking actually takes. Doors open 6am weekdays, so a pickup before the school run or the commute into the Hills District is straightforward.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom eggless cake Rouse Hill Box Hill
